function.name: tap
function.description: Tap on a UI element on the screen. Use description to tap by label. When multiple elements share the same label (e.g. two 'Install' buttons), use the x/y coordinates shown in the get_screen output (@(x,y)) to tap the correct one.

description.description: The accessibility content description or visible text of the element to tap, e.g. 'Search', 'OK', 'Send'. Skip when using x/y coordinates.

x.description: Screen X coordinate from the @(x,y) shown next to the element in get_screen output. Use when multiple elements share the same label.

y.description: Screen Y coordinate from the @(x,y) shown next to the element in get_screen output. Use when multiple elements share the same label.
